textByHash.deab4cf059e2ef4ba4937b261b92ca97ed61de5a: Hey, iknami. Sorry to be a bother, but could you lend us a hand?
textByHash.ea0a32a08182e21eb10ca1e419c7d32c24ec46a5: I'm just having a rotten day. My logs won't light and it's gone cold up here. Could you get a fire going for me?
textByHash.79c64f9b6e27ca7895985d42fece1626dfcb1a18: Hey, iknami. Any luck with that fire?
textByHash.fb1a2600dddcf1375355863909a49189e4fcb05b: Kuani! This is much nicer now we've got a fire going. The name's Bernard.
textByHash.32c029b6772c9adb949c80b2612dbd3f8e85fdc1: Worst one I've had. Mum taught me to be well prepared, but I've never had so many issues. I've even worn my sturdier work gear to deal with the creatures out here.
textByHash.0641c95a47b328db500555039b82f9f05584b2b6: Absolutely! In fact, this one's in honour of mum. She always wanted to take us up the Proudspire. I even managed to snag this necklace that reminded me of her just before setting off.
textByHash.bd6b391af66a29ffda069ac403695ab27dd34bb9: That's right... How did you know?
textByHash.1021dc06387096fdbb63f271cb97d8c89aace146: Hello again. Hope things are going well with you. Did you speak to that person you needed to talk to?
textByHash.9a8289f946e343f70deeed38a260690c991eeb81: Ah, hello again. I don't want to cause alarm, but there's a ghost here with us!
textByHash.e06029c1bab1254818c5f2364026170e55e4840f: Goodbye mum... I hope I keep making you proud. This necklace... It's not just like yours is it? It is yours. I'm going to finish this climb, for both of us.
textByHash.4b890c8066aa94447a3053d9ce2ff500856f1c63: I'll bury the necklace at the top. That way, even once I'm done, a part of us will always be on top of the world.
textByHash.47a413f4229d82a95b17d805142e02577ff29287: Thank you. Without you, I'd never have got to say goodbye. Now, I guess I'd better get going. I've got a mountain to climb.
